doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such State Bar protocol exists, and the State Bar cannot waive UPL under Business & Professions Code §6125 by internal protocol.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 93
REASON: No such State Bar of California protocol exists; it purports to waive UPL under §6125 without statutory authority, which the State Bar cannot do by protocol.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such State Bar protocol exists, and the State Bar cannot waive UPL under Business & Professions Code §6125 by internal protocol.
